lock_policy: Dated official pick files are append-only. Re-running the engine for the same date reuses the existing dated file instead of changing official picks.
note: Official picks require market edge, model probability >= 72%, Lab Score >= 80, pitcher support, and no major bullpen caution.

labScoreBreakdown.note: Lab Score grades setup quality. It is not win probability.

pick_team.label: Tired
pick_team.workload_read: Elevated recent workload. Full-game angles deserve extra late-inning caution.
pick_team.score_reason: Score 73/100 (Tired). Formula: 45 + ((12.7 - 9) x 3.5) + ((3.7 - 3) x 4) + (2 x 6). Last game bullpen IP: 3.7. Three-day bullpen IP: 12.7. Back-to-back arms: 2. Relievers used: 3 last game, 11 over three days. Context only, not score points.
pick_team.formula: 45 + ((Last 3 BP IP - 9) x 3.5) + ((Last game BP IP - 3) x 4) + (Back-to-back arms x 6)

context_only.note: Reliever counts are displayed for context only and do not add score points.

moneyline.why: Chicago White Sox is an official moneyline pick because it clears both gates: 77.9% model win probability and 89/100 Lab Score. LyDia projects 77.9% against a 59.8% no-vig market number, a 18.2% model edge at -157. Chicago White Sox owns the starting pitcher edge by 43 points. Bullpen read: Elevated volatility.
moneyline.risk: Primary caution: bullpen workload adds late-game volatility. Recheck official news before first pitch.
